more.title: Government Sets 2026 Winter Wheat Producer Price
more.description: By Kudzaishe Chimonera The Government has approved a producer price of US$524.56 per metric tonne for the 2026 winter wheat season, in a move aimed at encouraging farmers to increase production. more.title: Woman bites off neighbour’s ear in scuffle over man
more.description: A HARARE woman has been jailed for biting off her neighbours ear during a scuffle over suspected infidelity. Bridget Jengwa (24) of Churu farm, Glenview appeared before Mbare Magistrates Court where she was sentenced to 12 months’ imprisonment for a violent assault on a 21-year-old neighbour. However, of the 12 months’ sentence, Jengwa will spend [...] The post Woman bites off neighbour’s ear in scuffle over man appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com .

more.title: Harare woman sues city after falling into unmarked open drain
more.description: A 33-year-old Harare resident has dragged the City of Harare to court, demanding more than US$24,000 in damages after she fell into an unmarked drainage pit, suffering serious injuries she says have permanently altered her life.
